name: create_booking
description: Create a new booking for a specific Cal.com event type. You must provide the event type ID, a start time, the attendee's name and email, and a timezone. The booking is confirmed immediately unless the event type requires manual confirmation. Returns the booking details including a unique UID and meeting URL.

parameters.name: eventTypeId
parameters.description: The ID of the event type to book.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: The start time of the booking in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: attendee
parameters.description: Object containing attendee information: name, email, and timeZone.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Optional key-value metadata to attach to the booking.

data.title: 30 Minute Meeting between Jane Smith and John Doe
